goal: Generate a step card image for the 'Arrive at MCO' how-it-works step — a compact SUV parked at the MCO pickup zone with a host waiting nearby, phone in hand, ready to hand over the vehicle.

creative_direction.core_idea: Paso uno del viaje: el host ya está en MCO con el vehículo, phone en mano, esperando a la familia
creative_direction.visual_thesis: Confianza operacional — esta imagen muestra que el auto y el host ya están ahí antes de que el viajero salga del aeropuerto

composition.shot_type: editorial step card — vehicle and host both visible
composition.layout: host and vehicle sharing the frame, airport context recognizable in background

camera.depth_of_field: host and vehicle both in sharp focus, airport background softly recognizable

subject.description: Hispanic male host, 28-42, standing naturally near the vehicle — looking at phone as if tracking the arriving family. Casual but professional attire, no rental company uniform.
subject.expression: relaxed, ready, welcoming — not stiff or posed
subject.body_language: standing near vehicle, phone in hand, relaxed readiness

scene.location: Orlando International Airport (MCO) exterior pickup zone, Orange County, Florida
environment: MCO airport exterior architectural canopy or pickup zone structure
scene.background_view: MCO airport exterior pickup zone architecture — no readable airline logos or signage
critical_scene_rules: No readable airport signage or airline logos
No rental company branding on vehicle
Vehicle must be neutral color — silver or white
Host should look natural, not posed

lighting.type: Florida natural daylight — bright and warm
lighting.effects: clean vehicle highlights, natural skin tones on host, warm Florida sun quality

rules: Warm and inviting — not cold or clinical

negative_prompt: no rental company logos or uniforms
master_prompt: Create a premium editorial step card image for a how-it-works page illustrating the 'Arrive at MCO' step. Show a clean compact SUV — Nissan Rogue or Toyota RAV4 style — in silver or white, parked at Orlando International Airport exterior pickup zone. A Hispanic male host aged 28-42 stands naturally near the vehicle, holding a phone as if tracking the arriving family, with a relaxed welcoming expression. He wears casual professional attire with no branded rental company uniform. The MCO exterior architecture — canopy or pickup zone structure — is visible in the background with Florida blue sky and clean pavement. Use bright Florida natural daylight with warm highlights on vehicle and natural skin tones on the host. Both host and vehicle should be sharp, airport background softly recognizable. No readable airport signage or airline logos visible. The image should feel like a coordinated private car pickup — trusted, warm, professional. Avoid text, watermarks, readable signage, rental logos, convertibles, overcast sky, stiff poses, generic stock smiles, and cold lighting.
